and the fact that you went away for treatment will not be mentioned. But if you cannot or will not stop drinking, I

pg148-p2-s1: Your junior executive may not agree with the contents of our book.
pg148-p2-s2:
He need not, and often should not show it to his
alcoholic prospect.
pg148-p2-s3: But at least he will understand the problem and will no longer be misled by ordinary promises.
pg148-p2-s4:
He
will be able to take a position with such a man which is eminently fair and square.
pg148-p2-s5:
He will have no further reason for
covering up an alcoholic employee.
pg148-p2:
Your junior executive may not agree with the contents of our book. He need not, and often should not show it to his
alcoholic prospect. But at least he will understand the problem and will no longer be misled by ordinary promises. He
will be able to take a position with such a man which is eminently fair and square. He will have no further reason for
covering up an alcoholic employee.
pg148-p3-s1: It boils right down to this: No man should be fired just because he is alcoholic.
pg148-p3-s2:
If he wants to stop, he should be
afforded a real chance.
pg148-p3-s3: If he cannot or does not want to stop, he should be discharged.
pg148-p3:
It boils right down to this: No man should be fired just because he is alcoholic. If he wants to stop, he should be
afforded a real chance. If he cannot or does not want to stop, he should be discharged. The exceptions are few.
pg148-p4-s1: We think this method of approach will accomplish several things.
pg148-p4-s2: It will permit the rehabilitation of good men.
pg148-p4-s3:
At the
same time you will feel no reluctance to rid yourself of those who cannot or will not stop.
pg148-p4-s4:
Alcoholism may be causing
your organization considerable damage in its waste of time, men and reputation.
pg148-p4-s5:
We hope our suggestions will help you
plug up this sometimes serious leak.
pg148-p4-s6:
We think we are sensible when we urge that you stop this waste and give your
worthwhile man a chance.
pg148-p4:
We think this method of approach will accomplish several things. It will permit the rehabilitation of good men. At the
same time you will feel no reluctance to rid yourself of those who cannot or will not stop. Alcoholism may be causing
your organization considerable damage in its waste of time, men and reputation. We hope our suggestions will help you
plug up this sometimes serious leak. We think we are sensible when we urge that you stop this waste and give your
worthwhile man a chance.
pg148-p5-s1: The other day an approach was made to the vice president of a large industrial concern.
pg148-p5-s2:
He remarked: "I'm mighty glad
you fellows got over your drinking.
pg148-p5-s3: But the policy of this company is not to interfere with the habits of our employees.
pg148-p5-s4: If a man drinks so much that his job suffers, we fire him.

I don't see how you can be of any help to us for, as you see,
we don't have
